locations.ancient_ruins: Ancient Ruins – A forgotten site near the mountain where ancient relics and spirits are said to dwell.
locations.mountain_cave: Mountain Cave – A dark cave beneath the mountain, where the ancient spirit is said to rest.

items.ancient_relic: Ancient Relic – A relic found in the ruins that holds the power to awaken the mountain's spirit.
items.spirit_key: Spirit Soul – A fragment of the ancient spirit's essence, corrupted by greed.

characters.old_storyteller: Old Storyteller – An ancient figure who knows the truth behind the pact and the mountain's curse.

action_text.unlock-path: I unlock a new path from ${from} to ${to} with ${item}.
